name: stem_separation
description: Separate an audio or video file into individual stems (vocals, drums, bass, other) using Demucs. Outputs a JSON with paths to each stem WAV file. Use the vocals stem as input to lyrics_sync for accurate forced alignment on clean vocal audio.

input.description: Audio or video file to separate

output.description: Stem paths JSON: { vocals: path, drums: path, bass: path, other: path }

params.name: stems
params.description: Comma-separated stems to output: vocals, drums, bass, other, or 'all'. For lyrics_sync, use 'vocals'.

params.name: model
params.description: Demucs model. htdemucs is the default hybrid transformer model. htdemucs_ft is fine-tuned (slower, slightly better). mdx_extra is an alternative architecture.
